remember: Explain the concept of politics and its relation to human beings.
Define and differentiate between power, authority, and legitimacy.
List and explain the characteristics of modern democracy.
Describe the concept of equality and its types.
Explain the concept of justice and its types.
understand: Discuss the significance of the concept of politics in human life.
Explain the relationship between power and authority.
Compare and contrast the different types of democracy.
Analyze the concept of equality and its relevance in a democratic society.
Explain the concept of justice in a democratic society.
apply: Apply the concept of politics in real-life scenarios.
Use the concept of power, authority, and legitimacy to analyze a given situation.
Design a democratic system based on the characteristics of modern democracy.
Apply the concept of equality and justice in a given scenario.
Analyze the relationship between power and authority in a real-life situation.
analyze: Analyze the impact of the concept of politics on human life.
Compare and contrast the different forms of government.
Analyze the role of power and authority in shaping a society.
Examine the relationship between equality and justice in a democratic society.
Analyze the concept of justice in different cultures and societies.
